description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Three small noise reductions. None are individually critical — bundle into one PR.

1. The EXECUTED/LINKED/CLAIMED/UNCOVERED legend (lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex:1007-1028, coverage_help) currently re-renders inside every subject's Coverage tab. Move to a single page-level disclosure near the triage panel; subject tabs link to the anchor instead of duplicating.

2. The "Raw spec-verification" disclosure (html.ex:1152-1183) is power-user noise on every Coverage tab. Move to a single page-level "Raw verification (all subjects)" disclosure near the bottom.

3. The misc panel's file tree (render_unmapped, html.ex:1393-1427) is overkill when N≤3 unmapped files. Render as a flat list under N=3, tree above.

No semantic change; this is purely density work.

Verification stubs flipped: none

Summary: Trimmed three sources of repetition in the spec.review HTML artifact.
(1) Coverage legend (formerly defp render_coverage_help, lines 1007-1028) was duplicated inside every subject's Coverage tab. Now renders once at page level with anchor #coverage-help; per-tab help link points to it.
(2) "Raw spec-verification" disclosure (formerly defp render_verification_section, lines 1152-1183) was duplicated per subject. Now a single page-level "Raw verification (all subjects)" section grouped by subject, anchored #raw-verification.
(3) Misc panel (defp render_unmapped, lines 1393-1427) used the file-tree rail unconditionally. Now flat list when N <= 3 unmapped files, tree above the threshold.

Pre-flight: mix spec.check passed (status=pass, errors=0, warnings=0, findings=0). Full mix test suite passed (564 tests, 0 failures). Generated artifact verified: legend appears 1× (was 33×), raw-verification details block appears 1× (was 33×), 33 per-tab help links point to the single anchor.

- Intent-level scope concerns: none. Diff is purely UI density (legend dedup, raw-verification dedup, misc tree threshold) plus scoped CSS for the moved/new elements. mix.exs untouched (no new deps). No new semantic claims; subject Coverage tabs simply link to page-level disclosures rather than embedding bodies.

Notes:

- Misc flat-list (N<=3) is mechanically a guard at the function head; the existing branch (N>3) preserves the tree+rail layout. No unmapped-files fixture in current test data exercises either branch directly, but the guard is straightforward and the existing render_unmapped tests still pass.
- read_only_viewer requirement preserved: only additions are <a href="#anchor"> same-page links and a native <details> element. No <form>/<input>/<button> that posts state.

title: Trim repetition: legend, raw verification, misc tree
